title: Effect of 'Green Gold Plus' Application on Groundnut Yield
abstract: In a field trial in the 1992/93 post-rainy season at Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, groundnuts were given 2 foliar applications of 'Green Gold Plus' (containing amino acids, organic matter and N, Cu, Mn, Mg, Fe, Zn and B at 27, 2.5, 10, 5, 2.6, 28 and 0.25 g/litre). Pod, haulm and seed yields were increased by 26, 24 and 35% with application of Green Gold Plus.
